caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering, and a gold chain. He wears headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. To his left, a white wall displays a repeating logo with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. Behind him, a blue banner reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk in front of him are a black device and a black container with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera angle and the surrounding equipment remain static. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a small logo containing a microphone is visible.
